description: Assertions for one valid captioned video.
assertions: Exactly one video is sent to the Actor.
Transcript input sent to OpenAI is no longer than 60000 characters.
The AI result satisfies the strict summary, keyIdeas, actionItems, and timestampedMoments schema.
Exactly one page is created in the selected Notion QA database.
The final result contains the HTTPS URL returned by Notion.
A delivered video and research-goal rerun creates no OpenAI request and no second Notion page.
A Notion failure does not commit the request to the delivery ledger.
Unavailable captions create no OpenAI request and no Notion page.
